category_sources: Official GitHub README and homepage describe tex-fmt as a LaTeX formatter.
source_facts.description says tex-fmt is an extremely fast LaTeX formatter written in Rust.
display_name_sources: Official project homepage title is tex-fmt.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains installation, usage, configuration, and integration documentation.
source_facts.homepage is official project documentation at https://wgunderwood.github.io/tex-fmt.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/WGUNDERWOOD/tex-fmt; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README lists CLI usage and supported LaTeX-related file types .tex, .bib, .cls, and .sty.
source_facts.description identifies LaTeX formatting and Rust implementation.
